'''Skim fighters''' were sleek [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] fighters used during the [[Battle of Solem]].

Skim fighters would skim the surface of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and hunt down [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] troops. At least one Rebel managed to destroy one of these fighters single-handedly.

==Appearances==
{{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of skim fighters}}
*[[Empire 7|''Empire'' 7]] {{1st}}
